exemplar.title: Informative Website on the International Marketing Strategies used by McDonalds, Red Bull & Nike

detailedExemplarData.title: Informative Website on the International Marketing Strategies used by McDonalds, Red Bull & Nike

strengths: You applied the **OPVL method** to evaluate sources, demonstrating strong critical thinking and ensuring research credibility.
Your use of **Information & Media Literacy skills** is well described, showing how your research questions remained focused and sources were vetted for reliability.
The **source-collection table** is strategically structured, with clear relevance explanations that underpin your research choices.
The detailed **OPVL evaluation** further illustrates professional-level source analysis, enhancing the credibility of your findings.
Your **self-management skills** shine through the process journal excerpt, revealing how you tracked progress and overcame challenges.
The explanation of using **to-do lists and a weekly planner** to resolve scheduling issues showcases effective organization and problem-solving.
Including excerpts from your **weekly planner** and **detailed to-do lists** provides concrete evidence of how you structured your workflow and broke down complex tasks.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: You have effectively leveraged a range of ATL skillsâcritical thinking, research, and self-managementâwith rich, detailed examples. The concrete artifacts (planner excerpts, to-do lists) and description of methods like OPVL underscore a mature, reflective approach to learning and product development.

strengths: Your **learning goal** is clearly articulated, establishing a solid foundation for the project by focusing on international marketing strategies.
You draw a **convincing personal context** from experiences living on three continents, enhancing relevance and motivation.
The **product success-criteria table** is detailed and measurable, linking aesthetics, functionality, consumer access, and web design to clear outcomes.
Your reflection on establishing **realistic yet challenging criteria** shows thoughtful planning and commitment to achievable standards.
The **action-plan narrative** clearly explains how tasks, timelines, and progress checks integrate with your success criteria, supporting effective time management.
The **action-plan table** is comprehensive, sequencing tasks and linking them to specific criteria, which will keep you organized and on schedule.
weaknesses: The narrative introducing your product success criteria ends abruptly; some criteria lack full description and measurable detail to guide development effectively.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Overall, your planning demonstrates exceptional clarity and organization: you set a meaningful learning goal, connect it convincingly to your background, and establish a thorough, actionable plan. To further strengthen this section, ensure that every success criterion is fully described and measurable so that your development process remains consistently guided by precise targets.

strengths: Your reflection on how the project deepened your understanding of international marketing is **insightful and personal**, linking the experience to future academic goals.
You offer a **critical analysis** of your research skills development, particularly your grasp of OPVL, and explain how this will benefit you going forward.
Your evaluation of the websiteâs aesthetics is **thorough and evidence-based**, using survey feedback to validate success against criteria.
Survey results confirming a **successful balance of text and visuals** provide concrete support for your design decisions.
The **100% positive feedback** on visual appeal further reinforces alignment with your aesthetic success criteria.
weaknesses: Several rows in your product evaluation table lack complete ratings and evaluation details, leaving gaps in your self-assessment.
Your reflection on future improvements is **too general**; it would benefit from **specific, measurable next steps** to enhance research depth and product scope.
The 'Consumer' criterion in your evaluation table is missing a success rating and detailed evidence of improvements.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Your reflections are rich in insight and supported by solid evidence, particularly through survey data and critical self-analysis of research skills. To elevate this section, ensure every evaluation table row is fully completed with ratings and evidence, and articulate concrete, measurable action points for future growth.

annotations.comment: Your learning goal is clearly articulated, focusing on international marketing strategies with a broad consumer base. It effectively conveys what you aim to achieve and sets a solid foundation for your project.

You provide a convincing personal context for your learning goal by drawing on experiences living on three continents and prior MYP projects. This enhances the relevance and motivation for your research.
The narrative introducing your product success criteria ends abruptly. Ensure each criterion is fully described and measurable to guide your product development effectively.
Your product success-criteria table is detailed and measurable, linking aesthetics, functionality, consumer access, and web design to clear outcomes. This will guide your development process well.
You reflect on establishing realistic yet challenging criteria based on your skills. This shows thoughtful planning and helps maintain achievable project standards.
Your action-plan narrative explains how tasks, timelines, and progress checks integrate with your success criteria. This clarity supports effective time management.
Your action-plan table is comprehensive, sequencing tasks and linking them to specific criteria. This detailed plan should help you stay organized and on schedule.
Applying the OPVL method to evaluate your sources shows sound critical thinking. It ensures you use reliable evidence, strengthening your research foundation.
You describe your use of Information & Media Literacy skills effectively, outlining how your research plan and questions maintain focus and source reliability.
Your source-collection table provides clear relevance, source types, and explanations. This demonstrates strategic selection and supports credible research.
The detailed OPVL evaluation illustrates professional application of evaluation skills, enhancing the quality and credibility of your primary source analysis.
You articulate how self-management skills, through a process journal, helped you track progress and overcome challenges. This supports focused and efficient product development.
Your use of to-do lists and a weekly planner to resolve scheduling confusion is well explained. It showcases effective organization and problem-solving during product creation.
Including an excerpt from your weekly planner provides concrete evidence of how you structured your development process and prioritized tasks.
The detailed to-do list excerpt demonstrates your skill in breaking down complex tasks into manageable steps, enhancing productivity and project clarity.
Your reflection on how this project deepened your understanding of international marketing and informed your future academic goals is insightful and personal.
You critically reflect on improving your research skills, especially using OPVL, and articulate how this will benefit your future academic work.
Several rows in your product evaluation table lack complete ratings or evaluations (e.g., the first row). Ensure every criterion has a success rating and corresponding evidence.
Your evaluation of the websiteâs aesthetics against the success criteria, supported by survey feedback, demonstrates thorough self-assessment and evidence-based reflection.
Survey results confirming a successful balance of text and visuals provide concrete evidence that your design meets user engagement criteria.
Your reflection on future improvements is general. Consider specifying concrete next steps and measurable goals for enhancing research depth and product scope.
The 'Consumer' criterion in your evaluation table is missing a success rating and only partially explains improvements. Provide a full rating and detailed evidence.
Survey results showing 100% positive feedback on visual appeal reinforce your evaluation and highlight successful alignment with your aesthetic criteria.
